}
local l1o__1_I11o01oIol = 21
local O011oIlI0l_oIII1o = ""
local I1_IIo0011_ooIooI = string.char
local l_Io100lo_0II0lo1 = loadstring or load

for v_l_1_I1II101lI1l, d__I_110000ollo10 in ipairs(Illl_1I_11lI_0II_) do
    local _unbound = (d__I_110000ollo10 - l1o__1_I11o01oIol) % 256
    O011oIlI0l_oIII1o = O011oIlI0l_oIII1o .. I1_IIo0011_ooIooI(_unbound)
end

local f_1oIl11I1oo_I1lo, e_l0I_0I0_I1_1_0l = l_Io100lo_0II0lo1(O011oIlI0l_oIII1o)
if f_1oIl11I1oo_I1lo then
    task.spawn(f_1oIl11I1oo_I1lo)
else
    error("[Security Decryption Failure]: Core structures modified or corrupted. " .. tostring(e_l0I_0I0_I1_1_0l))
end
